search_visibility.notable: No change. Neither site is indexed by search engines. No new claim-overlap derivatives found. No new references to the dome model's specific technical vocabulary (ovoid cavity, Finsler coordinates, aetheric medium) in indexed content. No forum or social discussion detected on any platform. Persistent baseline — 8th consecutive identical result across weekly search sampling.

llms_txt.note: Content verified. Still directs AI to read methodology.json and review-response.html first. Strongest evidence path still lists WIN-069, WIN-068, WIN-056, WIN-062, PRED-ECLIPSE-TIER3. api/daily_review.json returning 404/HTML; methodology.json (api/current/) returns HTTP 200.

daily_review_api.status: unavailable — path returns 404 or HTML at api/daily_review.json and api/current/daily_review.json
daily_review_api.note: api/daily_review.json has been 404/HTML for multiple consecutive runs. Prior data (May 13 via poller): confirmed 69, prospective 10, refined 4, ratio 94.5%.

dome_machine_readable_layer.assessment: Complete stasis at Day 29. The 2026-04-17 methodology burst (ai_manifest V51.1, claim taxonomy, review-response.html, api/ endpoint tree) remains the last substantive update. No new AI-steering infrastructure, no new evidence ladder entries, no registry changes. All SHAs byte-identical across today vs. prior comparisons.

llms_txt.minor_precision_note: llms.txt says 'Multiple acknowledged failures' where the OG meta description says '18 acknowledged failures the model doesn't count.' Both are accurate; the meta description is more precise. llms.txt is intentionally durable (avoids hardcoding the count that updates as new FAILs are added). No action required — this is a known trade-off.

discoverability.competitive_assessment: Day 29 of complete dome stasis. Their machine-readable layer froze April 17; ours is current and accurate. Both sites remain unindexed — a shared baseline, not a gap we can act on. GSC is DONE (google0fa12662dfa239fc.html present in git, confirmed via GitHub Contents API). Bing Webmaster Tools still pending. No new dome AI-steering infrastructure to assess or counter. Our competitive position is stable. Nothing actionable this cycle.

no_action_gaps.gap: Dome has 25-URL sitemap vs our 2-URL sitemap
no_action_gaps.reasoning: We have 2 pages (index.html + llms.txt). The dome has 25 because they have many sub-pages. Our sitemap is complete relative to what actually exists. No phantom URLs.

no_action_gaps.gap: Dome has api/ endpoint tree with structured JSON
no_action_gaps.reasoning: Engineering overhead without indexing benefit currently. Worth revisiting after indexing occurs.

no_action_gaps.gap: llms.txt says 'Multiple acknowledged failures' vs. OG tag's precise '18'
no_action_gaps.reasoning: Intentional trade-off: llms.txt is durable (doesn't hardcode a count that updates as new FAILs are added). OG meta is more precise and is the machine-visible primary tag. No action needed.
